content_body: Thank you so much for our stay here. The cabin was everything we imagined and more; it was very welcoming and clean. I would love to come back in the fall and see what the view looks like then with all the trees changing colors. I can only imagine how beautiful it is! We all enjoyed the rocking chairs and theater, and it was nice to have all the movies to choose from. We also enjoyed the big kitchen table because everyone was able to sit around the table and have some much needed family time! We were able to have game nights, and we laughed until our cheeks hurt! With busy everyday life it is so easy to get caught up in jobs, technology, and just the everyday stress of life so we are all very thankful for this cabin and the weekend getaway! I will forever remember this trip and the memories made. Thank you!
title: I Will Forever Remember This Trip!
